item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":true,"emergency_constraint_present":true,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":true,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Three sensor-battery transfers were cleared with temporary dispatch notes"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"release-control decision was never closed and the missing-record condition returned"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"last helicopter slot closes before the storm reaches the ridge"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Permit one exception for this battery transfer"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"require the mountain operations director to settle the release rule by noon tomorrow"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"The weather window is closing now"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"final helicopter load only"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"the director has accepted the noon review"}],"abstain_reason":""}
